  "confidence_score": 0.85,
  "attack_summary": "A critical system process, lsass.exe, exhibited highly anomalous behavior by performing an excessive number of rapid registry modifications to network configuration keys. This activity, coupled with an outbound connection to an ephemeral port, strongly suggests a compromise of lsass.exe to establish command and control or facilitate defense evasion by altering network settings.",
